title: MD
biography: Hideyo Noguchi was a Japanese bacteriologist who contributed to the understanding of syphilis, yellow fever, and other infectious diseases. He died of yellow fever while researching it in Ghana.
aiSummary: Hideyo Noguchi is a bacteriology specialist at Rockefeller Institute for Medical Research. Based in New York.

timeline.title: Cultured Treponema pallidum
timeline.description: Demonstrated the syphilis spirochete in the brain of patients with general paresis

timeline.title: Died researching yellow fever
timeline.description: Contracted and died of yellow fever while studying the disease in Accra, Ghana
